message:
fix(freeze): fix function signature mismatch and remove vstack clear

QuickJS patch:
- Update frozen_dispatch_lookup extern to include closure_var_count and bytecode_ptr params
- Update frozen_dispatch_lookup_bytecode extern to include closure_var_count param
- Update call sites to pass b->closure_var_count and (void *)b
- Add safe closure variable access functions (js_frozen_get_var_ref_safe, etc.)
- Add cpool access functions for nested function registration

Zig codegen:
- Remove aggressive vstack clearing after every instruction (was killing performance)
- Add dispatch table mode for large functions (>50 blocks)

The signature mismatch was causing argument misalignment and crashes.
Fib benchmark now runs at ~3100ms (close to 3000ms baseline).
